title: Certificate
description: A witnessed verdict + its evidence -- the verifier layer's keystone token. Wire-compatible across implementations (matches Certificate.to_dict()).

verdict.description: The three-valued lattice verdict -- no authority-shaped value exists.

oracle.description: Versioned oracle id -- the tool's self-provenance, e.g. 'propositional-dpll-v1'.

evidence.description: Ordered (key, value) string pairs -- counterexample, unsat marker, or reason.
